MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-16-2016 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-16-2015 Set For Trial On Jun-13-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Apr-12-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Martin Velez of Law Office of G. Martin Velez telephone number 415-342-4125 for Plaintiff Mark Uthe.

No other appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

Mr. Velez informed the Court that a dismissal was filed on April 5, 2016 and explained his efforts and form of communication he had with his Client's Mother and Father. PLAINTIFF MARK UTHE'S MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD is off calendar.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Feb-16-2016 Continued To Apr-12-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty G. MARTIN VELEZ, ESQ. of Law Office of G. Martin Velez, Tel No. 415-342-4125 appearing for the moving party;
No other appearances made in this matter.

The Court's tentative ruling required parties to appear at hearing. Matter argued by Mr. Velez. The Court continues Attorney G. Martin Velez's Motion to Be Relieved as Counsel for Mark Uthe to April 12, 2016 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 302, Law & Motion. Mr. Velez will make further efforts to resolve this issue with Mr. Uthe's next-of-kin. Mr. Velez need not file any further briefing. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976 (302/HK)
